title: veronica cana var. miqueliana
intro: Veronica cana var. miqueliana is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Plantaginaceae) and is a variety of Veronica cana, a type of speedwell native to Japan. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. In traditional herbal medicine, Veronica cana var. miqueliana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried for its medicinal properties.
